base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of main_menu — a ui (menu_screen) from 1989 simcity. Main-menu palette — Build/Bulldozer/Residential/Commercial/Industrial/Road/Rail/Power/Park. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
